options.purpose: Place an item in the toolbar.
Render a DevExtreme widget inside the toolbar item.
Pass options to the nested widget.
Add a scoped class hook for local styling.

validationRules: Use before for navigation and primary context controls.
Use after for secondary commands and refresh/export actions.
Use widget plus options for interactive controls instead of hand-built buttons.

options.purpose: Control whether an item moves into the overflow menu.
Control whether item text is visible in the toolbar or only in the menu.
Allow toolbar items to wrap onto multiple lines.

validationRules: Use locateInMenu=auto for non-primary actions when horizontal space is limited.
Use showText=inMenu for icon buttons that still need clear menu labels.
Avoid multiline in dense enterprise shells unless wrapping is an explicit requirement.
